title: POGOMAN
description:
Put a quarter in the slot and start this arcade up.
POGOMAN is a fast paced physics platformer where you use a pogostick to go through weird, hard and precision based levels.TIME YOUR JUMPS PERFECTLYDONT HIT YOUR HEAD (otherwise you explode)UNLOCK NEW SKILLSdash, grappling hook, and a pogo gun are all on the table
FIGHT GIANT WORMSDont ask. The game doesnt have a specific theme or story, I just added what sounded fun.
And currently there are only 3 worm levels, but im planning on adding more in the future.AVOID MISSILES AND MINES... AND METEORS

80 LEVELS ON 7 DIFFERENT BIOMES
description_short: POGOMAN is a fast-paced physics platformer where you navigate tough, nerve-wracking levels on a pogostick. Master cool maneuvers, unlock abilities, and survive intense challenges as you bounce through unique biomes. Precision and timing are everything. Oh, and don`t get hit in the head.
